title: Spaghetti Puttanesca
description: My Thermomix take on Anna Del Conte's puttanesca — a punchy tomato sauce with olives, capers and anchovy.
keywords: Anna Del Conte inspired Thermomix recipe
intro: This is my independent Thermomix homage to Anna Del Conte and the comforting appeal of puttanesca. It keeps the spirit of the original inspiration, but the method is written fresh for TM6 and TM7 cooks who want clear settings and a warm, achievable result.
steps: Chop garlic 3 sec / speed 6. Add anchovies, chilli and oil, sauté 3 min / 120°C / speed 1.
Add passata, olives and capers. Cook 14 min / 100°C / Reverse / speed 1, MC off.
Season, toss through the spaghetti with parsley.
tips: The anchovy melts in — it's savoury depth, not fishiness.
Capers and olives are salty, so taste before adding salt.

faq.a: Skip the anchovy and add a splash of soy for umami.

faq.q: Is this the original Anna Del Conte recipe?
faq.a: No. This is Chef Aly’s independent Thermomix reinterpretation inspired by Anna Del Conte and puttanesca; it is not endorsed by or affiliated with the chef.
